name: Planning in Fabric IQ Deployment
description: Deploy Planning in Fabric IQ extension: planning schema, 5 writeback-ready tables, 3 analytics views, and populate with scenario-modeled targets (Revenue, Finance, Workforce) plus plan-vs-actual variance analysis.

tasks.name: Resolve GoldLH
tasks.description: Look up GoldLH Lakehouse ID from workspace items. Requires Deploy-Full.ps1 to have been run first.

tasks.name: Execute Planning SQL
tasks.description: Create planning schema, 5 Delta tables (PlanRevenueTargets, PlanFinancialTargets, PlanWorkforceTargets, PlanVarianceAnalysis, PlanScenarioSummary), and 3 views via a temporary Spark notebook executing CreatePlanningTables.sql.

tasks.name: Populate Revenue Targets
tasks.description: Generate channel-level revenue targets with Base (+8%), Optimistic (+15%), and Conservative (+3%) growth scenarios using last 6 months of FactOrders as baseline.

tasks.name: Populate Financial Targets
tasks.description: Generate P&L account targets by account type using FactBudget baseline with 3 scenario growth projections.

tasks.name: Populate Workforce Targets
tasks.description: Generate headcount and payroll targets by department using FactPayroll baseline with differentiated growth rates for headcount vs payroll.

tasks.name: Populate Variance Analysis
tasks.description: Build consolidated plan-vs-actual variance from FactBudget with status flags (Favorable, On Track, Unfavorable, Critical) and inverted logic for expense accounts.

tasks.name: Populate Scenario Summary
tasks.description: Aggregate all domain targets into a cross-domain executive comparison table by scenario and fiscal quarter.

tasks.name: Organize Notebooks
tasks.description: Move planning notebooks into the '03 - Data Transformation' workspace folder alongside existing HorizonBooks notebooks.
